Title: Pikkoro kara no dasshutsu! Arashi o yobu Gohan
Actors: Masako Nozawa, Toshio Furukawa, Daisuke Gôri
Plot: Gohan does his homework in a cave as he thinks about how much he misses his parents. He then makes a boat and sails across the desert, where he is chased by a giant bird. He crash lands on an island, and he befriends a tiger as he...
